name: Thai Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Fresh small red chile (you can omit the chile -- I did when I made this for you)
1 Shallot, finely chopped (or use green onion)
2 teaspoons Fish sauce (or just use a little salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add peanuts and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned. Remove from heat and let cool.
2. Peel cucumber and remove seeds. Grate one half of the cucumber using a cheese grater, and slice the other half into very thin slices (or grate the whole cucumber or slice it entirely, depending on preference).
3. Finely chop the shallot and mix with lime peel. Mix lime juice, fish sauce, and brown sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, making sure to add peanuts just before serving to prevent them from becoming soggy. Toss gently until well combined.
5. Serve immediately.
